items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding the specific behavior of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result is achieved. As such, the validation cannot be conclusively determined as either satisfied or unsatisfied.
